about.title: About
about.summary: Senior Full-Stack & AI Engineer with 6+ years of hands-on experience across web systems, embedded hardware, and autonomous AI agents. I architect production-grade LAM (Large Action Model) systems using a proprietary 12-layer cognitive framework — spanning perception, memory, security, and outcome optimization. From Awwwards-level UIs to backend pipelines that cut manual workflow time by 70%+, I build software as an architect: engineered from first principles, delivered without excuses.
about.story_p1: My story starts at a metallurgy factory — my family's. Growing up surrounded by machinery, circuits, and the smell of molten metal, I learned early that engineering isn't just a career, it's a mindset. My formal introduction to technology came through robotics classes, and when I enrolled in the Technical Electronics program at Fundação Liberato, one of Brazil's most respected technical schools, I dove headfirst — leading study groups, building hardware projects, and absorbing everything I could about how systems work.
about.story_p2: Before I ever wrote a single line of production code, I learned what resilience really meant. During my studies, I worked summers as a waiter and sold food on the street to support myself. The pandemic delayed my graduation, but it also gave me time — time I used to obsessively self-teach backend development, read documentation at 2AM, and build my first web projects from scratch. I completed the Electronics technician course in 2022 and hit the ground running.
about.story_p3: My first professional role was an internship at Pramel Equipamentos Eletrônicos, where I developed firmware for PIC, ESP32, and STM32 microcontrollers and designed PCB layouts for industrial power monitoring systems. Working at the intersection of hardware and software gave me a systems-thinking perspective that I still apply today — understanding how every layer of a stack communicates and depends on the others.
about.story_p4: After the internship, I returned to the family company to lead production while building my freelance practice in parallel. I shipped web applications for small businesses, participated in AI and backend bootcamps, and spent every spare hour training on platforms like Remotask and Outlier — evaluating LLM outputs, conducting RLHF workflows, and reviewing AI-generated code for correctness and safety. That experience gave me a rare insider view of how production AI models are trained and where they fail.
about.story_p5: In 2024, I joined Integrum Inteligência Industrial ERP as a Junior Programmer. I built an LLM-powered internal chatbot using the OpenAI API that cut ticket resolution times by 45%, automated the documentation pipeline from a 3-day process to under 2 hours, and raised test coverage from 20% to 75%. I was promoted quickly — not by tenure, but by shipping things that mattered.
about.story_p6: Today I operate as a Senior Full-Stack & AI Engineer, delivering autonomous agent systems, commerce platforms, and full-stack products for clients who need more than code — they need outcomes. At LB Solutions, I architected an entire Commerce OS: from AI-powered email triage (InboxFlow) to product launch automation (NewDrop), Kanban logistics, and a Shopify tracking platform (LB Tracking) that masks carrier origins and converts shipping data into premium branded experiences. I'm a Computer Science student (expected 2028), an INTJ-A thinker, and someone who sees software not as a job — but as the clearest way I know to engineer the future.
about.personality_p1: I have an INTJ-A profile, characterized by being introverted, intuitive, analytical, planning, and assertive. In the professional environment, I apply rationality and organization as main guides, always seeking concrete results with efficiency and quality. I remain calm in the face of challenges and value innovative solutions that bring real impact.
about.personality_p2: Outside of work, I balance this rational side with traits of empathy and sensitivity. I am attentive to people, concerned with listening and understanding different perspectives, which strengthens teamwork. I feel more engaged when everyone is aligned, dreaming of the best for the project, dedicated, and willing to give their all. I value brainstorming moments, where each idea is collectively improved, making projects more solid and innovative.
about.personality_p3: I have as constant motivation automating tasks, creating striking designs, and delivering results I can be proud of. Dedication, innovation, healthy perfectionism, and ambition are among my main marks. My tendency to imagine future scenarios allows me to anticipate risks, identify improvement points, and prepare solutions before problems arise, turning planning into a differential.
about.hobbies_p1: I am passionate about reading, exploring from science and science fiction to fantasy, suspense, and romance. Some of my favorite books include Eu, Robô by Isaac Asimov, the Millennium trilogy by Stieg Larsson, O Hobbit, O Oceano no Fim do Caminho by Neil Gaiman, Todo Dia by David Levithan, and Jogador Nº1. I also like comics, such as Watchmen, Sandman, Preacher, in addition to Marvel and DC classics, like Batman and Homem-Aranha. I am also a fan of manhwas, with some of my favorites being Return of the Mount Hua Sect, Solo Leveling, The Eternal Supreme, Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint, Magic Emperor, Overgeared, and Tower of God.
about.hobbies_p2: I am a gaming enthusiast, with a preference for titles that challenge strategy and reasoning, such as Dark Souls, Elden Ring, Sekiro, Satisfactory, Clair Obscure Expedition 33, Devil May Cry 5, Detroit: Become Human, Horizon Forbidden West, and The Witcher 3. I also follow animes that combine engaging stories and captivating characters, such as Steins;Gate, Death Note, Guilty Crown, Bakuman, No Game No Life, Haikyuu!!, Boku dake ga Inai Machi, and Jojo’s Bizarre Adventure.
about.hobbies_p3: I love movies of different styles, from dramas and romances to thrillers and fiction, with highlights for Mr. Nobody, Weathering With You, Before Sunrise, The Wolf of Wall Street, Everything Everywhere All at Once, Django Livre, and The Shawshank Redemption.
about.hobbies_p4: Outside the universe of reading, movies, and games, I like to cook and experiment with new dishes, improving recipes and creating my own versions. This passion for cooking combines creativity, patience, and attention to details — qualities that I also apply in software development and design projects.
about.hobbies_p5: I have a versatile musical style and like to explore different genres. To make it easier, you can check my playlist on Spotify:

talk.title: We Need to Talk
talk.p1: Often, I see companies rejecting great professionals simply due to a lack of “formal experience,” as if years of signed employment were the only measure of competence. This frustrates me — because I know, and have seen in practice, people with many years in the market delivering less, dedicating little, and working carelessly, while others, determined and committed, are left out just for not fitting this superficial mold.
talk.p2: I am not someone who settles for doing just the minimum. Before delivering any code, I review, learn, improve, and polish, until I am sure it is solid, clean, and sustainable. I do not see this as empty perfectionism, but as respect: respect for the client, the team, and my own work.
talk.p3: I have been rejected in interviews for being too honest, for admitting that I still have a lot to learn. But I say without fear: we all do. No one knows everything, and those who think they have reached the top have just stopped evolving. I, on the contrary, live in search of learning. This is my incessant flame. My dreamy passion for technology makes me want not just to write code, but to expand the limits of what it can do, take technology to new levels, transform ideas into intelligent and useful realities.
talk.p4: If you are looking for someone who will not just “meet the deadline,” but who will fight to deliver quality, intelligence, and evolution in every project, then we need to talk.
talk.p5: The button below will schedule the interview on my Google Calendar and I will be notified.

resume.title: Senior FullStack & AI Agents Architect
resume.summary: I build LAM (AI-as-Tool) agents at DeepMind-level depth — production systems engineered with a proprietary 12-layer cognitive framework spanning perception, memory, security, and outcome optimization. With 6+ years of full-stack and AI engineering experience, I design architectures that are cost-efficient, scalable, and built to evolve autonomously via 3 Recursive Self-Improvement (RSI) systems and 13 original mechanisms including Success Trace Extraction.
resume.summary2: I also craft Awwwards-level UI/UX systems powered by GSAP and Framer Motion, design animated brand identities, and engineer solid backends with Clean Architecture and Cyber-security best practices. I plan software as an architect — from inception to a zero-bug final delivery.
